**✅ Acceptance Criteria (Gherkin)**
-

*Define the expected behavior using Given/When/Then scenarios.*

```gherkin
Feature: <Short feature description>

  Scenario: Criteria X
    Given <initial context>
    When <action is performed>
    Then <expected outcome>

  Scenario: Criteria Y
    Given <initial context>
    When <action is performed>
    Then <expected outcome>

```
